Top-of-page nav.

Prohibited content

Google Ads has policies that govern the kinds of content you can and cannot promote. Ads, ad assets, and destinations must comply with all applicable laws and regulations in the locations where they are shown.

  • Counterfeit goods.
  • Dangerous products or services.
  • Content that enables dishonest behavior.
  • Inappropriate content, including hate speech.

Violating these policies may result in your ads being disapproved or your account being suspended.

Footer noise.
